DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., AS SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POLARIS BUSINESS SYSTEM $7,661.76 PRINCIPAL, $1,100.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $358.94 INTEREST, $266.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,387.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX )

PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-30-2010, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
